nodes.label: sanad-review-flashcard.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad app's Smart Review (المراجعة الذكية) flashcard feature. Shows a student-mode flashcard session: card 2 of 32, 1 correct so far. The active card is tagged 'قضية' (Case) and displays 'قضية الدوسري ضد شركة الأمل التجارية' (Al-Dossari vs Al-Amal Trading Company) at the Riyadh Court of Appeal, with a prompt to flip the card. Navigation tabs include Student Morning, Study Materials (5), Academic Deadlines, Terms Bank (16), Cases Bank (6), and Smart Review. Dual role selector (Student / Lawyer) and EN language toggle visible in header.

properties.card_content: قضية الدوسري ضد شركة الأمل التجارية — محكمة الاستئناف بالرياض
properties.interaction_hint: اضغط لقلب البطاقة (Press to flip the card)
properties.footer_tagline: سند — لوحة العمليات اليومية للمحامين والمنشآت الصغيرة في السعودية

nodes.label: Smart Review Flashcard Feature
nodes.description: The active-recall flashcard review mechanism within the student module. Cards are drawn from the Cases Bank and Terms Bank, tagged by type (قضية/مصطلح), and presented one at a time with flip-to-reveal interaction. Session tracks total cards, position, and correct answers.

nodes.label: Student Mode (طالب)
nodes.description: One of two primary user roles in Sanad (the other being Lawyer/محامي). Student mode surfaces academic-oriented features: study materials, academic deadlines, terms bank, cases bank, and smart review flashcards.
